chapter_title.en: Chapter on Marking and Garlanding (sacrificial animals)

text: 2576 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَّهَا تُشْعَرُ وَ هِيَ مَعْقُولَةٌ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2576 - In a narration from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Imam (as):
"The camel is marked (Ish'ar) while it is restrained."
